meaning: n.(=kosher)合法的卫生食品,犹太教食品adj.(=kosher) 正确的
examples: There will also be a show at New York's Steven Kasher Gallery from July 5 to September 8, and an exhibit at EMP Museum in Seattle, opening on July 14.
Brian Kasher is being honored as a Champion of Change for his innovative energy priorities and sustainable living practices making a greener community a possibility in any American city or town.
